prerequisites: An Appcues account with access to the account settings pages.
Your Appcues account_id, found on the account settings page at https://studio.appcues.com/settings/account.
An Appcues API Key and API secret, generated at https://studio.appcues.com/settings/keys.
A start_date in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format to bound the sync window.

authMethods.name: API key credentials (username and password)
authMethods.summary: Appcues authenticates API requests with an API Key and API secret generated at https://studio.appcues.com/settings/keys. Supply the API Key as the username config field and the API secret as the password config field (the connector's only secret field). Both are sent together to authorize requests scoped to your account_id.

setupSteps.title: Locate your account ID
setupSteps.body: Open https://studio.appcues.com/settings/account in your Appcues account and copy your account_id. Enter it in the required account_id field.

setupSteps.title: Generate API credentials
setupSteps.body: Go to https://studio.appcues.com/settings/keys and obtain your Appcues API Key and API secret. Enter the API Key in the username field and the API secret in the password field.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide a start_date in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ format. The connector syncs data from this point forward.
